name: Perdita Ortega
title: La Diabla

abilities.name: Impossible Angles
abilities.text: When declaring (missile) actions, this model may choose a marker within 8" of a type it has not chosen this turn. If it does so, this model draws range and LoS for the declared action from the chosen marker. After resolving the declared action, remove the chosen marker.

abilities.name: Stand Strong Together
abilities.text: Enemy models receive a (-) when targeting this model if this model is within 6" of another ally.

actions.name: Bullet Bending
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or (gun)10". If this action draws range and LoS from a marker, it receives a (+).

triggers.name: Ricochet
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to a different model within 3" of the target.

triggers.name: Shield the Family
triggers.text: An ally within 6" may declare the Prepare action.

triggers.name: Premonition
triggers.text: Look at the top card of your fate deck. This model may discard it.

triggers.name: Dead Before You Draw
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has an Adversary token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise it gains an Adversary token.

triggers.name: Hero's Gamble
triggers.text: Once per turn. Discard this model's control hand. Draw a number of cards equal to the number of cards discarded by this action plus one.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Finger on the Trigger
actions.effects: This model gains a Reload token.

extraction_notes: Bound by Blood ability has no visible text on this card front
